title: Do You Remember Green Bricks?
description: Mod, that restores Green Bricks from Beta 1.6.
body:
Do you remember Green Bricks? 

Yeah, those ones, which were removed by Notch in Beta 1.6. There aren't many people left these days who didn't forget about them.

But memory is still alive. The main goal of our project is restoring legendary Green Bricks as they used to be in 2011.

First of all, you should obtain Green Shards from Creepers. You need to smelt them to get the green bricks. Use nine of them on the Crafting Table and the Green Bricks block is yours! Pretty simple, isn't it?
